ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_conversion" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion record */,
  "us_size" TEXT /* Full name of the US size */,
  "us_size_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the US size */,
  "bust_cm" INTEGER /* Bust measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist_cm" INTEGER /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "hips_cm" INTEGER /* Hips measurement in centimeters */,
  "international_size" TEXT /* Corresponding international size */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for the international size */,
  "height_range_cm" TEXT /* Height range in centimeters */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Type of fit (e.g., slim, regular, oversized) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender (e.g., men, women, unisex) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user measurement record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "bust_cm" INTEGER /* Bust measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist_cm" INTEGER /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "hips_cm" INTEGER /* Hips measurement in centimeters */,
  "recommended_size" TEXT /* Recommended clothing size based on measurements */,
  "height_cm" INTEGER /* Height in centimeters */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the measurements were taken */,
  "fit_preference" TEXT /* User's preferred fit type (e.g., slim, regular, oversized) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender (e.g., men, women) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_measurements_recommended_size FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_size") REFERENCES size_conversion ("international_size")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each size conversion record
Full name of the US size
Type of fit (e.g., slim, regular, oversized)
Unique identifier for each user measurement record
Recommended clothing size based on measurements
Date when the measurements were taken
User's preferred fit type (e.g., slim, regular, oversized)
